samples.xml_description:
<module id="counter_12">
    <description>Counter from 0 to 11, controlled by valid_count.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low)</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal</input>
        <input id="valid_count">Enable counting</input>
        <output id="out" width_description="[3:0]">Current count</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="0">Idle=0</parameter>
        <parameter id="1">Count=1</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">State register for FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" type="combinational_logic" width_description="[1:0]">Next state register for FSM.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential>
            if (rst_n == 0) begin
                <then>
                    <assign id="out" value="4'b0000"/>
                </then>
            </if>
            else begin
                <then>
                    <if id="condition">
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <term id="0">state == 0</term>
                                <term id="1">valid_count == 1</term>
                            </and>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign id="next_state" value="1"/>
                            <assign id="out" value="4'b0000"/>
                        </then>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <then>
                            <if id="condition">
                                <condition>
                                    <and>
                                        <term id="0">state == 1</term>
                                        <term id="1">valid_count == 1</term>
                                    </and>
                                </condition>
                                <then>
                                    <assign id="next_state" value="1"/>
                                    <assign id="out" value="out + 4'b0001"/>
                                </then>
                            </if>
                            <else>
                                <then>
                                    <assign id="next_state" value="0"/>
                                </then>
                            </else>
                        </then>
                    </else>
                </then>
            </else>
        </sequential>
    </implementation>
</module>
